Senior Frontend Engineer (React)

About the role
We are building a design-forward web product and need a frontend engineer to own
our single-page application and component library.

Responsibilities
- Build and maintain a large React + TypeScript single-page application.
- Own our design system and reusable component library (Storybook).
- Ensure accessibility (WCAG) and responsive design across devices.
- Optimize front-end performance: bundle size, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals.

Required qualifications
- 4+ years of professional frontend development.
- Expert in React, Redux, and TypeScript.
- Strong CSS: Tailwind CSS or Sass, responsive layouts, cross-browser support.
- Experience with a modern build toolchain (Vite or Webpack) and Jest testing.
- Consuming REST/GraphQL APIs from the browser.

Nice to have
- Next.js server-side rendering.
- Figma and close collaboration with designers.
